title: Wholesome Velvet Greek Rice Flour Pancake Hot-Pot-Vessel
description: A floral, velvety greek dish featuring rice flour pancakes tempered with dark chocolate, perfect for a midnight craving. Whole30 friendly.

ingredients.name: 1/3 cup
ingredients.notes: dark chocolate (cooking or unsweetened), finely chopped, 70% cacao

ingredients.name: 2 cups
ingredients.notes: milk of choice, almond or soy milk

instructions: In a large bowl, mix rice flour and flaxseed meal.
Add salt, vanilla extract (if using), and dark chocolate. Stir well.
Beat eggs in a separate medium-sized bowl.
Gradually pour milk into the egg mixture while continuously whisking to prevent lumps.
Stir wet and dry ingredients together until smooth.
Pour batter into prepared hot-pot-vessel, filling it about 2/3 full.
Bake at 170°C (340°F) for 60 minutes or until golden brown on top and set inside.
Serve hot with a drizzle of dark chocolate ganache.
